ops.note: Daemon (com.cc-steer.watch) unloaded. Residual hook-spawned `cc-steer scan --no-sync` processes from other live Claude Code sessions remain and cannot be fully quiesced machine-wide; accepted deliberately — scan only INSERT-OR-IGNOREs new feedback rows (covered by rows_at_start/rows_at_end + the convergence pass), and the blocking gate-repair race requires sample-negatives, which runs only from the unloaded daemon pipeline.
